title: An Act relative to the definition of disclosure, apology and early offer programs

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Plouffe of Brockton, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 2514) of Bridget Plouffe relative to the definition of health care adverse outcome disclosure, apology and early offer programs.  Public Health.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Public Health
